description_long: This is a classic bungalow-style residential building surrounded by a low, rectangular hedge fence and a manicured lawn. The house features a symmetrical facade with a central entrance, flanked by evenly spaced windows and a prominent front porch. The roof is a steep gable type, with dormer windows adding architectural interest and natural light to the upper level. The exterior walls are painted a light gray, complemented by white trim and detailing around the windows and doors. Several mature trees are positioned both inside and outside the fenced yard, enhancing the suburban feel. The property is well-maintained, with clear pathways leading to the entrance and a sense of order in the landscaping.
description: A symmetrical, light gray bungalow with a gable roof, central porch, and surrounding hedge fence, set amidst manicured lawns and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch, symmetrical windows, and fenced yard with a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the hedge fence extending along the side, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with evenly spaced windows and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, side windows, and the continuation of the hedge fence and landscaping.
